history.content:
Alright prom, next thing id like to get fixed - we already have the tool for it - we just need to get it to work properly - the teams system. So - whenevr a manager says goal_complete and the turn is over - i would like that message to get sent directly to you - and then whenevr you get that - i want you to do a quick analysis of the team - the goal, what was done, agents ran, tools used, etc, and then send ME a message accordingly. in a new chat session on the main chat page - the same way that tasks create a new chat session with their "auto" tag. 

Example: "Manager
4h ago
Status update: audit pipeline is complete and all required artifacts are now present in the correct team workspace path:

1) [REDACTED-HE].md
2) [REDACTED-HE].md
3) [REDACTED-HE].md
4) [REDACTED-HE].md

I also updated team goal tracking to reflect completion and set focus to review/execution readiness for the remediation backlog.
[GOAL_COMPLETE]"

read the self.md and lets fix this properly.

Perfect — I read `SELF.md`, traced the team/coordinator/notify/task pipeline, and submitted a proper src proposal for this.

✅ **Proposal ID:** `prop_1774502975631_96f35f`  
✅ **What it does:** when manager outputs `[GOAL_COMPLETE]`, it will:
1. Relay that completion to main pipeline (not just team chat),
2. Auto-spawn a new **auto-style main chat session**,
3. Run a quick analysis (goal, completed work, agents/runs, tools usage, manager final message),
4. Send you a clean owner-facing summary in that new thread.

If you approve it, I’ll execute/verify the patch next.
